allow: PowerShell($env:ASPNETCORE_URLS="http://localhost:5199"; Start-Process -FilePath "dotnet" -ArgumentList "run --project C:\\work\\github\\DeeJayTC\\dotnet-minified\\samples\\MinifiedDotnet.SampleApi\\MinifiedDotnet.SampleApi.csproj --no-build" -PassThru | Select-Object Id | Out-File C:\\work\\github\\DeeJayTC\\dotnet-minified\\.pid.txt -Encoding utf8; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { $all = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:5199/api/users; "GET all -> $\($all | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)"; $one = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:5199/api/users/1; "GET 1 -> $\($one | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" } catch { "ERR: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $post = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:5199/api/users -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"name":"Grace Hopper","email":"grace@example.com"}'; "POST -> $\($post | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)"; Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:5199/api/users/$\($post.id\)" -Method Delete; "DELETE $\($post.id\) -> ok"; $bad = try { Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:5199/api/users -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"name":"","email":"x"}' } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ }; "POST empty name -> HTTP $bad" } catch { "ERR: $_" } finally { Get-Process dotnet -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Id -ne $PID } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })
